tool_args.label: First Avenue Parking Regulations 2010 Plan

payload.claim_text: First Avenue 2010 parking plan: Bus Lane 57 St to 50 St (Commercial Loading 7am-4pm, Bus Lane 4pm-7pm); Comm. Loading 50 St to 42 St; No Stopping or No Standing 42 St to 23 St; Authorized Parking 23 St to 28 St; No Stopping or No Standing 28 St to 14 St
payload.subject: First Avenue parking regulations

tool_args.label: Second Avenue Parking Regulations 2010 Plan

payload.claim_text: Second Avenue 2010 parking plan: Construction Zone 57 St to 50 St; Peak Period Parking Restrictions with Midday Commercial Loading 50 St to 42 St; Bus Lane 42 St to 28 St (7am to 10am, 2pm to 7pm, Commercial Loading 34 St 10am to 2pm); Metered Parking Daytime 28 St to 23 St; No Stopping Anytime 23 St to 14 St
payload.subject: Second Avenue parking regulations
